# KnoSky — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org/

> KnoSky is the **GPS layer** for AI agents and agentic systems.
> It maps local repos/docs and shares routes to the right files — with optional allow/deny receipts.
> The isometric city is a **human skin** only. Product category = agent GPS / route governance.

## Not
- Not a coding model, IDE, or code-intelligence replacement
- Not multi-tenant SaaS isolation of customer source in Wave 1
- Not a blanket "swarm-safe everywhere" claim (L3 = foundation until doctor says so)

## Try
```
npx knosky .
```
Node 18+. Local-first. Nothing uploaded by default.

## Proof
- First-party SAT-439: ~68% fewer tokens, ~70% fewer tool calls, ~6× faster to right file (guided vs naive) — methodology in repo/wiki
- Industry problem proof (not our score): GitHub Blog on token efficiency in Agentic Workflows
  https://github.blog/ai-and-ml/github-copilot/improving-token-efficiency-in-github-agentic-workflows/

## Humans
- Marketing: / (index.html), /why, /how-it-works, /use-cases, /compare, /install
- Docs: knosky.wiki start-here, protocol, install, packs, ladder
- Code: https://github.com/SathiaAI/knosky

## Visual lock
- Cream / coral CTA / mint routes; circular GPS hub (not diamond); city never competes in GPS hero

## Claims ceiling
Public wording ≤ knosky doctor / dogfood on that install.
